title: You Are Carrying A Load Of Hazmat

Which class of hazardous materials are assigned compatibility group letters?
You are transporting ammunition. You have an emergency on the road. Which of the shipping papers provides instructions for who to call?
Which form references the ERG pages first responders might need in an emergency?
Which ERG section contains the numbered guides first responders rely on when responding to a HAZMAT incident?
To pass vehicles inspection as described on DD Form 626, a vehicle transporting HAZMAT must have which four of the following items?
qas.a:
Spare electrical fuses

Two 10-BC rated or higher fire extinguishers

Covered cargo area or fire-retardant tarpaulin

First aid kit

qas.q: When transporting HC 1, What is allowed in the cargo area of the vehicle?
Only ASP personnel need to complete and sign the DD Form 626
Inspector use DD Form 626 to check vehicle mechanical equipment, mirrors and lights, and
You are transporting a load of HAZMAT and you see grass fires in a field nearby. What requirements would you have to meet to continue driving?
qas.a: Be able to pass by the fire without stopping

qas.q: You are transporting a load of HC 1.2 on a mountain highway. There is a tunnel ahead and you need to pull over and check the traffic before you proceed. How far do you have to be from the tunnel when you stop?
According to 49 CFR, you must inspect the vehicle tires at the beginning of each trip, whenever the vehicle is parked, and every
qas.a: 2 hours or 100 miles, whichever comes first

You are carrying a load of hazard class 8. What should be included with the shipping papers?
Compare Block 14 of the DD Form 2890 shown here to the container. Which statement is true?
qas.a: Block 14 is missing the UN number and hazard class/ division and subsidiary hazards, which are required.

qas.q:
Compare Block 14 of the DD Form 2890 shown here to the container. Which statement is true?

Chlorine, 2.3 (5.1,8) I
1 Cylinder
Toxic inhalation Hazard Zone B
qas.a: Block 14 is missing the UN number, which is required

qas.q:
Compare Block 14 of the DD Form 2890 shown here to the container. Which statement is true?

Water reactive solid, n.o.s,
qas.a: Block 14 is missing the UN number, which is required

qas.q:
Compare Block 14 of the DD Form 2890 shown here to the container. Which statement is true?

UN1017, Chlorine, PG I
qas.a: Block 14 is missing hazard class/ division and subsidiary hazards, which are required.

qas.q: You are involved in a traffic incident while transporting HAZMAT. You were only able to grab DD Form 2890 before you jumped out of the vehicle. What does the form tell first responders when they arrive?
qas.a: Applicable ERG guide numbers for the material

qas.q: You are involved in a traffic incident while transporting HAZMAT. You safely egress the vehicle before it catches fire. When first responders arrive they ask what you are transporting. What do you do?
qas.a: Give first responders the shipping papers.

qas.q: According to Section II of DD Form 626, which items must be inspected and in proper working condition on a vehicle transporting HAZMAT?
You are transporting a load of HAZMAT. When does the vehicle have to be fully inspected using DD Form 626?
According to 49 CFR, you CANNOT park a loaded HAZMAT vehicle
qas.a: near open fires or smoking areas

qas.q: According to the 49 CFR, you must inspect the vehicle tires
qas.a: before each trip and each time you park the vehicle
